Document:
# Core Rule 7. ## Do not threaten to report a player.
Threatening, or saying that you will ahelp or report someone, is a rulebreak under this rule.
Instead of saying that you will report or ahelp someone, a better substitute would be reporting them instead of saying anything at all.
[italic]This rule [bold][color=red]does not[/color][/bold] discourage you from using the admin help system. It simply asks of you to not state or threaten ahelping.[/italic]
